fixes_applied.description: Replaced print_history_page.billing_cycle_period_card.screenshot() with page.locator(print_history_page.elements.billing_cycle_period_card).screenshot() on line 201 to use correct Elements pattern access
Replaced expect(print_history_page.billing_cycle_period_card) with expect(page.locator(print_history_page.elements.billing_cycle_period_card)) on line 204 to use correct Elements pattern access

Fixed wrong access pattern by restructuring page_additions file to properly define locators in Elements class with Locator property assignments in __init__. This ensures test script's property access (print_history_page.plan_pause_info) works correctly.

Restructured page_additions file to define locators inside proper Elements class definition instead of module-level constants. Changed from module-level constants to 'class Elements:' with all locators as class attributes.

Removed all verification methods (verify_plan_pause_info_not_displayed, verify_plan_pause_info_displayed, verify_complimentary_pages_value, verify_additional_pages_value) from page_additions file. These methods use expect() assertions which should be in test script, not in page objects.

Ensured tooltip locators (complimentary_pages_tooltip, additional_pages_tooltip) are properly converted to Locator properties in __init__ method by adding self.complimentary_pages_tooltip = page.locator(self.elements.complimentary_pages_tooltip) and similar for additional_pages_tooltip.

Removed 'from playwright.sync_api import expect' import from page_additions file. This import was only needed for verification methods which have been removed. Page objects should not contain assertion logic.

post_fix_summary.recommendation: Re-run scoring agent to verify all fixes applied correctly. All violations have been successfully resolved: (1) Corrected inline locator access patterns in test script to use page.locator(elements.selector), (2) Restructured page_additions file with proper Elements class definition, (3) Removed verification methods from page_additions, (4) Removed unnecessary expect import, (5) Ensured all locators have proper Locator property assignments in __init__.
